plugins.description: Make any API agent-usable: comprehend an OpenAPI into first-call-correct MCP tools, wire x402 payments, and defend against poisoned specs. Bundles three skills (api-agent-ready, x402-payai-setup, anti-poisoning) plus agents and commands.
